data.title: Medallia Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Voice of the Customer Platforms Report
data.description: In Tyson, Virginia, Medallia, Inc., a top player in customer and employee experience, was recently acknowledged as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Voice of the Customer (VoC) Platforms. This marks the fifth consecutive time that Medallia has achieved this recognition in the report. The company was particularly noted for its strong performance in Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. This acknowledgment underscores Medallia's dedication to transforming extensive customer data into valuable business insights.

data.title: KORAD Brings Korean Radioactive Waste Technology to the World Stage in the United States
data.description: Korea Radioactive Waste Agency (KORAD) recently took part in the Waste Management Symposia 2026, showcasing their support for export efforts of small and medium-sized partner companies. Through a joint exhibition pavilion, KORAD, led by President & CEO Sungdon Cho, displayed their commitment to addressing waste management. This initiative aimed to boost opportunities for these firms in the global market, emphasizing collaboration and innovation in the industry. The event in Phoenix saw a significant presence from KORAD, highlighting the importance of sustainable waste solutions and fostering partnerships for a greener future.

data.title: Verndale Acquires Homestead Studio, Expanding Full-Funnel D2C Growth Capabilities
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Boston, Verndale, a prominent digital experience and technology firm, revealed the purchase of Homestead Studio, a top-tier D2C acquisition and retention agency as well as a Klaviyo Master Elite Partner. Following the acquisition, Homestead will function as a component of Verndale's DTC division, solidifying their position in the market.

data.title: Core Development Group Sponsors Reading Event at Boys & Girls Club of Paterson and Passaic
data.description: Core Development Group, a prominent commercial solar and energy storage contractor in New Jersey, revealed their premium sponsorship of the Boys & Girls Club of Paterson and Passaic's Read Across America event. This noteworthy event is set to occur from March 9 to March 13 in celebration of Dr. Seuss's birthday. Read Across America aims to promote literacy among children and is a well-known national reading motivation and awareness initiative. This sponsorship highlights Core Development Group's commitment to supporting educational initiatives, with a focus on enhancing literacy among youths.

data.title: Alliance for Patient Access Marks 20 Years of Patient-Centered Advocacy
data.description: In Washington on March 12, 2026, the Alliance for Patient Access (AfPA) marked its 20th anniversary as a leading advocate for patient-centered care. What started as a modest group of clinicians has now become a significant national entity influencing health policy. AfPA has played a crucial role in shaping policies that impact patient access to healthcare services. This clinician-led organization has evolved into a powerful force, showcasing the impact of dedicated advocacy.

data.title: Jared Schmidt from Canada crowned World's Sustainable Cocktail Champion 2025 by Flor de Caña
data.description: In an event held in Granada, Nicaragua on March 12, 2026, Jared Schmidt, representing Osetra Bar in Canada, emerged as the winner of the "World's Sustainable Cocktail Champion 2025." The competition, organized by Flor de Caña, a leading brand in sustainability, saw participants from around the world showcasing their talent and dedication to sustainable practices. Schmidt's winning cocktail impressed judges with its innovative use of sustainable ingredients and techniques. This victory highlights the growing importance of sustainability in the cocktail industry.

FED'S BOWMAN: HOPES TO IMPLEMENT NEW RULES WITHIN A ‘RELATIVELY SHORT TIMEFRAME’

THE WHITE HOUSE'S LEAVITT STATES THAT THE UNITED STATES IS THINKING ABOUT TEMPORARILY SUSPENDING THE JONES ACT, A LAW THAT REQUIRES GOODS SHIPPED BETWEEN U.S. PORTS TO BE TRANSPORTED ON U.S.-BUILT AND OPERATED VESSELS. THIS WAIVER WOULD BE FOR A SHORT DURATION.

data.title: Paxos unveils daily stablecoin rewards engine for partners - switching from monthly to daily payouts for enterprise clients.
data.description: Paxos has introduced the Partner Rewards Engine, which offers daily on-chain stablecoin rewards to enterprise customers. This move signifies a shift from monthly payouts to a more frequent distribution system for all issued tokens.

data.title: Toll Brothers Debuts New Luxury Home Designs at Regency at Babcock Ranch in Punta Gorda, Florida
data.description: The latest offerings in the Lago and Sol Collections include new single-family homes with open floor plans and luxurious resort-style amenities. These properties are designed to provide residents with a modern and comfortable living experience. With a total of X number of homes available in these collections, prospective buyers have a wide range of options to choose from. The homes in the Lago and Sol Collections offer a unique combination of spacious layouts and high-end features, making them an attractive choice for individuals and families looking for a premium living space.
